Package com.wip.entity

Class Parcel

java.lang.Object
com.wip.entity.Parcel
@Entity public class Parcel extends Object
JPA entity representing a courier parcel booking in the tracking system.

Mapped to the parcel database table, this entity stores all details pertaining to a parcel shipment request, including source and destination addresses, weight, booking date, the associated Customer, and a one-to-one reference to the Shipment created for this parcel. Cascade removal on the shipment relationship ensures orphaned shipment records are automatically cleaned up when a parcel is deleted.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • getParcelId

      public Long getParcelId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this parcel.
      Returns:
      the auto-generated parcel ID

    • setParcelId

      public void setParcelId(Long parcelId)
      Sets the unique identifier of this parcel.
      Parameters:
      parcelId - the parcel ID to assign

    • getReceiverPhone

      public String getReceiverPhone()
      Returns the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the receiver phone number

    • setReceiverPhone

      public void setReceiverPhone(String receiverPhone)
      Sets the receiver's phone number for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      receiverPhone - the receiver's phone number to assign

    • getWeight

      public BigDecimal getWeight()
      Returns the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
      Returns:
      the parcel weight as a BigDecimal

    • setWeight

      public void setWeight(BigDecimal weight)
      Sets the weight of this parcel in kilograms.
      Parameters:
      weight - the parcel weight to assign

    • getSourceAddress

      public String getSourceAddress()
      Returns the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the source address string

    • setSourceAddress

      public void setSourceAddress(String sourceAddress)
      Sets the source (pickup) address for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      sourceAddress - the origin address to assign

    • getDestinationAddress

      public String getDestinationAddress()
      Returns the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the destination address string

    • setDestinationAddress

      public void setDestinationAddress(String destinationAddress)
      Sets the destination (delivery) address for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      destinationAddress - the delivery address to assign

    • getBookingDate

      public LocalDate getBookingDate()
      Returns the date on which this parcel was booked.
      Returns:
      the booking date as a LocalDate

    • setBookingDate

      public void setBookingDate(LocalDate bookingDate)
      Sets the date on which this parcel was booked.
      Parameters:
      bookingDate - the booking date to assign

    • getCustomer

      public Customer getCustomer()
      Returns the Customer associated with this parcel booking.
      Returns:
      the owning customer, or null if not set

    • setCustomer

      public void setCustomer(Customer customer)
      Sets the Customer associated with this parcel booking.
      Parameters:
      customer - the customer to link to this parcel

    • getCreatedBy

      public AppUser getCreatedBy()
      Returns the AppUser who created this parcel record.
      Returns:
      the user who created this parcel, or null if not set

    • setCreatedBy

      public void setCreatedBy(AppUser createdBy)
      Sets the AppUser who created this parcel record.
      Parameters:
      createdBy - the user responsible for creating this parcel

    • getShipment

      public Shipment getShipment()
      Returns the Shipment dispatched for this parcel.
      Returns:
      the associated shipment, or null if no shipment exists yet

    • setShipment

      public void setShipment(Shipment shipment)
      Sets the Shipment dispatched for this parcel.
      Parameters:
      shipment - the shipment to associate with this parcel
